event: Portrait of Christiane Gram in an evening dress
description: A formal half-length portrait of a young woman seated in a wooden chair against a dark background. She wears a white embroidered evening dress with puffed sleeves and a yellow sash at the waist. A long gold chain necklace hangs around her neck, from which a small jeweled cross pendant dangles. Her dark brown hair is arranged in elaborate curls piled high on her head. She has drop earrings and a composed, direct expression. The style is refined and neoclassical.

_meta.title: Portrait of Christiane Gram (1803-1845) in an Evening Dress
